bead.title: ADR-022 step 10: COORDINATE C7 (Guard contract; delete attempted map) with rev 5 worker
bead.description: Conflict: rev 5's worker keeps the per-Run attempted map (preserved from 41cb762e); C7 (ddx-06eb05d8) deletes attempted/hookFailed maps. Resolution: C7 lands BEFORE step 2 (path A), OR step 2 defines replacement (path B). Decision documented in this bead's resolution.
bead.acceptance: 1. Decision documented: path A or path B. 2. If A: C7 closes; step 2 worker uses Guard-derived exclusion. 3. If B: step 2 defines its own attempted-map equivalent + ACs; C7 amended. 4. No regression: priority-skip events from 80f51574 still emit; stay-alive defaults from 41cb762e still hold.
